neqsim.process.equipment.reactor

Package
Description
neqsim.process.equipment.capacity
Equipment capacity constraint framework for process optimization.
neqsim.process.equipment.electrolyzer
 
neqsim.process.equipment.reactor
 
neqsim.process.processmodel.biorefinery
Pre-built biorefinery process modules for NeqSim.
neqsim.process.util.monitor
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.equipment.reactor used by neqsim.process.equipment.capacity
    Class
    Description
    GibbsReactor
    Gibbs reactor for chemical equilibrium calculations using Gibbs free energy minimization.
    PlugFlowReactor
    Plug flow reactor (PFR) for rigorous kinetic modeling of chemical reactions.
    StirredTankReactor
    Stirred tank reactor (CSTR) for bio-processing and chemical operations.

    Class
    Description
    AnaerobicDigester.SubstrateType
    Substrate type enumeration.
    AnaerobicDigester.TemperatureRegime
    Temperature regime enumeration.
    BiomassGasifier.AgentType
    Gasification agent type.
    BiomassGasifier.GasifierType
    Gasifier type enumeration.
    CatalystBed
    Catalyst bed properties for packed bed and plug flow reactors.
    FermentationReactor.KineticModel
    Kinetic model type enumeration.
    FermentationReactor.OperationMode
    Operation mode enumeration.
    Fermenter
    Fermenter / bioreactor for biological conversion processes.
    FurnaceBurner.BurnerDesign
    Burner design options controlling how the energy balance is handled.
    GibbsReactor
    Gibbs reactor for chemical equilibrium calculations using Gibbs free energy minimization.
    GibbsReactor.EnergyMode
    Reactor energy mode: isothermal (constant temperature) or adiabatic (no heat exchange).
    GibbsReactor.GibbsComponent
    Inner class representing a component in the Gibbs reaction database.
    KineticReaction
    General kinetic reaction model for plug flow and stirred tank reactors.
    KineticReaction.RateBasis
    Rate basis for heterogeneous vs homogeneous reactions.
    KineticReaction.RateType
    Rate expression type.
    PlugFlowReactor.EnergyMode
    Energy balance mode.
    PlugFlowReactor.IntegrationMethod
    ODE integration method.
    PyrolysisReactor.PyrolysisMode
    Pyrolysis mode enumeration.
    ReactorAxialProfile
    Container for axial profiles from plug flow reactor simulation.
    StirredTankReactor
    Stirred tank reactor (CSTR) for bio-processing and chemical operations.
    StoichiometricReaction
    Simple stoichiometric reaction model for bio-processing.

    Description
    AnaerobicDigester

    Description
    FurnaceBurner
